SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT sys.gethost(url_column) AS host FROM urls WHERE url_column IS NOT NULL) AS temp;
SELECT u.url_column, sys.gethost(u.url_column) AS host FROM urls u WHERE sys.gethost(u.url_column) IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE more_urls (id INT, url CLOB);
SELECT m.id, sys.gethost(u.url_column) AS host FROM urls u JOIN more_urls m ON sys.gethost(u.url_column) = sys.gethost(m.url) WHERE m.url IS NOT NULL;
